title: Decentralized Local AI Coding Assistant
description: Engineered a distributed, secure AI infrastructure by splitting processing and gateway routing across two physical machines over a Tailscale VPN tunnel. Configured Ollama with Qwen2.5-coder:14b on the desktop node, routed API tool calling via OpenClaw and Tavily on the laptop gateway, and decoupled the UI by wiring the system into a private Discord bot for secure mobile access.

title: SCADA Smart Traffic Light System & Digital Twin
description: Designed a physical traffic control system using pure 74-series TTL digital logic on breadboards, bypassing standard microcontrollers for base logic. Utilized an Arduino Mega as a passive telemetry wiretap to read binary states and transmit them via a Web Serial API bridge to a live HTML/CSS/JS dashboard featuring zero-latency 2D physics simulation.

title: Automated HR Data Processing Pipeline
description: Engineered a Python/Pandas data automation pipeline, reducing a 3-day manual entry cycle into a 5-second automated script, achieving zero-error database ingestion.

title: Hardware & Network Telemetry Monitoring
description: Configured real-time hardware and network monitoring infrastructure within a dual-boot Ubuntu/Windows environment. Integrated with embedded systems to read physical telemetry and monitor system bottlenecks.
